name: accessready
description: A Section 508 preflight and remediation assistant for communications teams.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @accessready/core && npm run build -w @accessready/cli && npm run build -w @accessready/web
scripts.scan:samples: npm run accessready -- scan samples --format markdown --out samples/generated-accessready-report.md
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @accessready/core && npm run typecheck -w @accessready/cli && npm run typecheck -w @accessready/web
